I am wearing an exaggerated avant-garde outfit—structured sharp shoulders, metallic spikes, and latex textures that reflect the pink light. My makeup is dramatic with heavy contouring and perhaps a skeletal motif nodding to the video. The lighting is high-contrast and theatrical, casting long, sharp shadows. The vibe is empowering, monstrous, and unapologetically proud.

Correct.
 it is a new way of Symantec discovery, but in more natural descriptions. That is why I did the prompt expressively in the example. One has to describe their business as it is to be seen and described as with loaded files / information to then have the LLM generate the LLMs.txt file.
